questionHtml: Outline one reason why the maxima observed at W, X and Y will have different intensities from each other.
markschemeHtml:
intensity varies with distance OR points are different distances from the slits ✔

Accept “Intensity is modulated by a single slit diffraction envelope”.

meta.title: Outline one reason why the maxima observed at W, X and Y will have different intensities from each other.
